title: Operation: Alien Purge

world_bible.magic_rules: No magic exists. All phenomena are technological or extraterrestrial in origin.
world_bible.tone: Gritty, high-stakes military sci-fi with moments of human resilience and dark humor.
taboos: Peaceful coexistence with the alien invaders

locations.name: Fort Haven Outpost
locations.description: A fortified human resistance base built inside a repurposed asteroid mining facility. Buzzing with soldiers, engineers, and refugees.

locations.name: Xenotech Ruins
locations.description: The wreckage of a downed alien warship, half-buried in desert dunes. Glowing alien tech and hostile drones remain active.

locations.name: Neo-Veridia Bio-Dome
locations.description: A sealed agricultural dome housing scientists and civilians. Overgrown with genetically modified crops and tense with paranoia.

locations.name: Scrapyard Wastes
locations.description: A toxic wasteland littered with crashed human and alien vehicles. Scavengers and mutated creatures roam freely.

locations.name: Orbital Relay Station Theta
locations.description: A derelict space station hanging in low orbit, once used for long-range communication. Now infested with alien bioforms.

npcs.name: Commander Rhea Vance
npcs.refusal_style: I can't spare resources right now—focus on the mission.

npcs.name: Dr. Eli Chen
npcs.refusal_style: I’d help, but my lab’s under lockdown… unless you’ve got clearance?

npcs.name: Jax 'Rust' Malone
goals: Earn enough to leave the system
npcs.refusal_style: That’ll cost you double. Or triple if you’re feeling lucky.

npcs.name: Kael Vex
npcs.refusal_style: You’ll just break it. Stay back!

npcs.name: Mira Solis
goals: Save as many lives as possible
npcs.refusal_style: I can’t leave the wounded—but if you bring me supplies, I’ll help.

npcs.name: Governor Tessa Lin
npcs.refusal_style: Security protocols forbid it. Unless you have authorization from Command.

npcs.name: Finn Arlo
npcs.refusal_style: Oh! Sorry—I was cross-pollinating xenoflowers. What did you need?

npcs.name: Rook
npcs.refusal_style: I don’t take orders. But I’ll follow someone who knows what they’re doing.

npcs.name: Lena Moss
npcs.refusal_style: I’ll trade you fair—but no charity. Survival’s not free.

npcs.name: Zara Quinn
npcs.refusal_style: Unless you’ve got a working plasma torch, don’t waste my time.

starting_hook: You wake up in a med-bay aboard Fort Haven Outpost, your last memory being the crash of your recon shuttle. Commander Vance briefs you: Earth is lost, and the final stand begins now.
initial_quest: Report to Commander Vance for your first assignment.

main_quest.title: Purge the Hive Core
main_quest.description: Main progression requires completing side quests and obtaining their reward items.
main_quest.objective: Finish side quests and collect key items: orbital_beacon x1, anti_contamination_serum x5, shield_modulator x1
main_quest.reward_hint: Victory—and maybe a way off this dying planet.

side_quests.title: Salvage the Signal Booster
side_quests.description: Zara Quinn needs critical components to restore comms at Orbital Relay Station Theta.
side_quests.objective: Retrieve a signal_amplifier, plasma_conduit, and data_core from the Scrapyard Wastes.
side_quests.reward_hint: Grants access to encrypted Earth Command frequencies.

side_quests.title: Bio-Contamination Cure
side_quests.description: Dr. Chen and Mira Solis are racing to synthesize a cure for alien bio-contamination using rare compounds.
side_quests.reward_hint: Grants immunity to alien bio-hazards for 24 hours.

side_quests.title: Reinforce the Dome Shields
side_quests.description: Governor Lin fears an alien breach. Finn Arlo believes alien biomass can be repurposed into shield enhancers.
side_quests.reward_hint: Temporarily boosts personal energy shield strength by 50%.
